tickertape.in/market-movers.notes: Tickertape blocks Playwright. Use API directly. Returns JSON with stocks array. Each item has sid, slug, change_percent fields.
tickertape.in/market-movers.verified_code:
import requests
res = requests.get('https://api.tickertape.in/market-movers/getTopStocks?count=10&slug=gainers&indices=NIFTY500', headers={'User-Agent':'Mozilla/5.0'})
data = res.json()
for s in data.get('data',{}).get('stocks',[]):
    print(s.get('sid'), s.get('change_percent'))
